bugs.title: [Projects] API endpoint https://test-project-api.empcloud.com/health returns 502 Bad Gateway
bugs.body:
**Endpoint:** `GET https://test-project-api.empcloud.com/health`
**Status:** 502 Bad Gateway

The project API is returning 502, indicating the backend service may be down.

**Response:**
